nasb.text: After he had buried his father, Joseph returned to Egypt, he and his brothers, and all who had gone up with him to bury his father.

esv.text: After he had buried his father, Joseph returned to Egypt with his brothers and all who had gone up with him to bury his father.

cnv.text: 約瑟埋葬了他父親以後，就和他的眾兄弟，以及所有與他一同上去埋葬他父親的人都回埃及去了。

ccb.text: 葬礼之后，约瑟就跟众弟兄和一切随行的人返回埃及。

csbs.text: 约瑟埋葬了他的父亲之后，就和他的兄弟们以及所有与他一同上来埋葬他父亲的人，回埃及去了。
